name: TAJUU KAGE BUNSHIN NO JUTSU (MULTIPLE SHADOW REPLICATION TECHNIQUE)

description.value:
Type: Ninjutsu

Rank: 9 (Spell Level 5)

Chakra Cost: 5

Learn DC: 24 | Successes: 6

Perform: 12 | Perform DC: 26

Components: C, E, H, Mas

This forbidden technique is a variant of Kage Bunshin, trading quality for quantity. Unless otherwise noted, the clones are identical to shadow clones created by Kage Bunshin.

You suffer 1d3 damage for each mass shadow clone when created, which cannot be mitigated in any way.

Control: Mass shadow clones disappear if they move more than half a mile from their creator.

Statistics: Mass shadow clones apply the following:

- Their maximum HP equals 1 /6 your character level.
- They take a -8 penalty to attack rolls
- They take a -10 penalty to Defense
- They take a -4 penalty to saving throws

Combat: Mass shadow clones cannot make more than one attack per round.

Empower: Spend 1 Chakra per clone to create additional clones. Each clone created deals damage to you, as noted in the technique description. You cannot control more than 3 mass shadow clones per character level at the same time.

Mastery: The fifth step increases the maximum number of mass shadow clones you can control to 4 per character level.
